changes: Loadout: one exhaustive power-aware optimizer now drives both HACK and DECRYPT — it searches every owned software × CPU × GPU × RAM × PSU combination and applies the optimal one (fewest swaps that clears the required defence/crypt rate), instead of blindly maxing hardware. "Underpower" is only reported when no combination can clear the bar.

Loadout: a timed-out power readout after an apply no longer permanently bugs the job as underpowered — it is retried next cycle (transient vs permanent failures are now told apart across all loadout-driven flows).

Auto Jobs: server availability now accounts for broken routes — a hub server on maintenance (K/D) cuts off every server behind it. Jobs for those servers are skipped from acceptance with an explicit "no path" reason, and already-taken jobs are postponed (never bugged) until the route is back.
Auto Jobs: a market whose server has no route from HOME is not refreshed at all that cycle (no more burned refresh timeouts) and is marked "no-path" on the Job List.
Auto Jobs: new "UI Show" master switches to hide individual popup panels (Network Map, Jobs, Flow Map, Activity Log).

Daily Ops: the Auto toggle now actually solves the new day even when the background status check fails (e.g. the session token expired during a long play session) — the rolled-over reset timer itself triggers the solver, and the in-game screen decides claimed/unclaimed. Every solver run now reports a terminal result, so soft failures retry promptly instead of stalling the watcher.
ICE WALL solver: the overlay no longer vanishes for 1–2 seconds when the game re-renders the puzzle window — it re-attaches and redraws within a frame.
